behavior_summary: This script implements a U8P_SABRE::look/examine handler for the entity. When the player examines the entity (U8P_SABRE::look action) the script emits a single bark string 'sabre' and then yields/suspends the process.
No dialog menus, branching logic, local variables, or global flag reads/writes are present in the routine; it is a simple one-shot response to the examine event.
Item metadata for a 'sabre' weapon (baseDamage 5, damageModifier 12, blade, treasureChance 3) is present in the file but is metadata and is not referenced by the U8P_SABRE::look handler.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SABRE::look executes as a process-type handler (processType 0x0208) triggered by a U8P_SABRE::look/examine event.
The function issues a single Bark (player-facing short description) with text 'sabre', then calls/suggests suspend to yield/end the process.
No conditional branches or menus are taken — linear, deterministic control flow.
open_questions: Is the included item metadata intended for separate item/weapon handling elsewhere in the asset, since U8P_SABRE::look does not reference it?
Does the engine's suspend call here simply end the U8P_SABRE::look process or leave the process able to be resumed by other engine events (suspend semantics inferred but not explicit)?
Is the bark string 'sabre' a literal in-game label, or an ID that maps to a localized string table at runtime?

main_function.name: U8P_SABRE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/U8P_SABRE::look response for the entity by producing a single bark ('sabre') and then yielding the script.
entry_conditions: Player triggers a 'U8P_SABRE::look' or examine action on the entity (engine invokes U8P_SABRE::look-type process).
ProcessType 0x0208 (engine's U8P_SABRE::look/examine process) — entry by game engine when examined.

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: engine/process operation to yield/end the script

external_calls.purpose: Yield or terminate the U8P_SABRE::look process after emitting the bark; inferred engine-level process control.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a U8P_SABRE::look/examine handler for the entity. When the player examines the entity (U8P_SABRE::look action) the script emits a single bark string 'sabre' and then yields/suspends the process.
